MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Horn, Esq., (415)874-9800 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Andrew Ribotto.
Andrew J. Kozlow, Esq., (510)832-7770 for Defendant/Moving arty Graystone Partners LP.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GRAYSTONE PARTNERS LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion Of Graystone Partners, Lps Motion For Summary Adjudication, Or In The Alternative Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issues exist as to Material Fact Nos. 14, 15, 18, 19 and 25. Additionally, the Unruh Act is not limited to registered domestic partners; it "may also protect the rights of other unmarried couples." Koebke v. Bernardo Heights Country Club (2005) 36 Cal.4th 824, 831. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
